allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"Which park has the most warblers?"}' -m 60)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('rt:',d.get\('response_type'\)\); sr=d.get\('species_search_results',{}\); print\('is_generic:',sr.get\('is_generic_type'\)\); print\('top_species:',sr.get\('top_species_names'\)\); print\('grouped keys:', [list\(r.keys\(\)\) for r in sr.get\('grouped_chart_data',[]\)[:2]]\)")
